enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Othakada'?

The song 'Othakada' expresses the playful and joyful aspects of love, highlighting the excitement and fun in a romantic relationship.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie?

In Pandiya Nadu, the song is set during a light-hearted moment that showcases the budding romance between the lead characters.

Who are the singers and music director of the song?

The song features the talented voices of Hariharasudhan and Sooraj Santhosh, with music composed by D Imman.

When was 'Othakada' released?

'Othakada' was released on September 25, 2013, as part of the movie Pandiya Nadu.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'Othakada' from the movie Pandiya Nadu captures the essence of youthful love and the playful banter between lovers. With its upbeat rhythm and catchy lyrics, it evokes feelings of joy and excitement, making it perfect for celebrations. The collaboration between Hariharasudhan and Sooraj Santhosh adds a unique charm, while D Imman's music complements Vairamuthu's poetic expressions beautifully. Overall, the song serves as a delightful anthem for romantic moments.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Othakada from Pandiya Nadu is a vibrant celebration of love, brought to life by the enchanting voices of Hariharasudhan and Sooraj Santhosh. With D Imman's catchy composition and Vairamuthu's poetic lyrics, this song perfectly captures the essence of youthful romance. Dive into this melodic journey that promises to uplift your spirits and make your heart dance!
stanzaMeanings: Hey, hey, buddy, this guy has put his one eye on someone, and if she leaves him, he will be a mess.
Did you win? The couple will come, the trouble will come. This is love, buddy, what is the fuss about?
Did you win? The garland will come, the person will come. This is love, buddy, what is the fuss about?
Did you win? The wedding thread will come, buddy, pull the thread.
Hey, hey, buddy, this guy has put his one eye on someone, and if she leaves him, he will be a mess.
The eye is showing affection, the eye is showing sorrow. The bond that is formed will bring a new connection.
This is love, buddy, what is the fuss about? The cell phone will get everything, and in five minutes, it will bring sadness and take away life.
Did you win? The wedding thread will come, buddy, pull the thread. Hey, hey, buddy, I have put my one eye on someone, and if she runs away, I will be left behind.
Did you win? Happiness will come, knowledge will come. This is love, buddy, what is the fuss about?
Even the moon and the tiger will fight, this is love, buddy, what is the fuss about?
The flower will become a bee, buddy, and the more will become a bear. Just like that, the flower will become a bee, buddy, and the more will become a bear.
